hero.title: Build Your Career in Security
hero.subtitle: Join one of Latin America's leading security organizations. We're always looking for disciplined, skilled, and committed professionals.

intro.text: GSI offers career paths in armed transport, physical security, technology, logistics, and corporate operations. We invest in training, safety, and professional development.

openings.title: Current Openings
openings.placeholder: We are currently updating our job listings. Please check back soon or contact our HR team directly.

items.training: Continuous professional training and certification programs
items.stability: Job stability with one of Mexico's leading security groups
items.growth: Career growth opportunities across multiple business units

cta.title: Interested in joining GSI?
cta.subtitle: Send your resume to our recruitment team.
